summary: Researched Python project structure for BimodalHarness: hatchling build backend, src/bimodal_harness layout with data/models/search/training/evaluation/lean/z3 subpackages, dependency versions (torch 2.12, numpy 2.4.6, z3-solver 4.16, lean-interact 0.11.3, datasets 4.8.5, wandb 0.27.0), ruff 0.15 + mypy 2.1 + pytest 9.0 toolchain, GitHub Actions CI with selective [ci] trigger and separate gpu-ci workflow.

artifacts.summary: Complete research report covering project structure, confirmed dependency versions, pyproject.toml skeleton, CI patterns, ruff/mypy configuration, and risks.
